title: New Horizons for Seniors Program -Pan-Canadian  stream  - funding program - Canada.ca
content:
## New Horizons for Seniors Program – Pan-Canadian Stream

## Information sessions
We will hold information sessions to give an overview of this application process. You can take part online or by teleconference.
- October 18, 2023 at 1 pm, Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) (French)
- October 19, 2023 at 1 pm, Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) (English)
- November 1, 2023 at 1 pm, Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) (French)
- November 2, 2023 at 1 pm, Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) (English)
If you are interested, send an email to edsc.pnhapc-nhsppc.esdc@servicecanada.gc.ca by October 31 at 12pm (noon), Eastern Daylight Time
In your email, specify your preferred language (English or French) and if you need accommodations by October 31 at 12pm (noon). We will send you the instructions on how to attend.

## Help and contact information
- Enquiries will be answered between October 4, 2023  at 12 pm (noon), Eastern Daylight Time (EDT)  to November 14, 2023 at 12 pm (noon), Eastern Standard Time (EST)
- Email: edsc.pnhapc-nhsppc.esdc@servicecanada.gc.ca
- If you need help or accommodations, please contact us by November 13 2023, at 3pm, Eastern Standard Time.
- Email: edsc.pnhapc-nhsppc.esdc@servicecanada.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
